title: Plant-based drinks: health benefits and risks
body: "A Scientific Advisory Committee on Nutrition (SACN) and the Committee on Toxicity of Chemicals in Food, Consumer Products and the Environment (COT) assessment of plant-based drinks made from almond, oat and soya.  The assessment covers the:   nutritional benefits and risks of plant-based drinks toxicological benefits and risks of plant-based drinks   It also makes recommendations for:   adults and children aged one year and over government industry research   "
